summary: Completed testing of Iteration 13 features: Policy and Claims Tab Redesign with new fields (ESKP/ESK/E policy types, life category counts, claims analytics). All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.

issues: Some existing claims show old policy types (Group Health, GTL) from previous iterations - this is expected as old data exists in DB

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/policies creates policy with new fields and auto-computes total_lives_count - PASS
Backend: Policy type accepts ESKP, ESK, E values - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/policies/{id} recalculates total_lives_count on update - PASS
Backend: GET /api/policies returns all new fields - PASS
Backend: GET /api/policies-analytics returns total_employees, total_spouse, total_kids, total_parents, total_lives, total_premium, total_addition_lives, total_deletion_lives - PASS
Backend: GET /api/policies-analytics returns type_breakdown with ESKP/ESK/E - PASS
Backend: GET /api/policies-analytics accessible by HR users - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims-analytics returns reimbursement_claims/count, cashless_claims/count, rejected_claims/count, under_process_claims/count - PASS
Backend: Claims ratio calculation (total_claimed/total_premium*100) - PASS
Backend: Renewal expected pricing calculation (total_claimed*1.30) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims-analytics accessible by HR users - PASS
Backend: POST /api/claims creates claim with ESKP/ESK/E policy_type - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims returns policy_type field - PASS
Frontend: Admin Policies page shows all new table columns (Policy #, Holder, Date, Type, Premium, Emp, Spouse, Kids, Parents, Total Lives, Add, Del, Status, Actions) - PASS
Frontend: Admin Add Policy dialog has all required fields including Policy Type dropdown (ESKP/ESK/E) - PASS
Frontend: Total Lives auto-calculates in Add Policy dialog (sum of Emp+Spouse+Kids+Parents) - PASS
Frontend: Admin Claims page has Policy Type dropdown with ESKP/ESK/E options - PASS
Frontend: HR Policies Dashboard shows key stats cards (Policies, Active, Premium, Total Lives, Additions, Deletions) - PASS
Frontend: HR Policies Dashboard shows life category cards (Employees, Spouse, Kids, Parents) - PASS
Frontend: HR Policies Dashboard shows 3 charts (Status Pie, Lives Breakdown Pie, Type Bar) - PASS
Frontend: HR Policies Dashboard shows policies table with all new columns - PASS
Frontend: HR Claims Dashboard shows Total Claims, Reimbursement, Cashless, Rejected cards with count and amounts - PASS
Frontend: HR Claims Dashboard shows Under Process, Total Premium, Claims Ratio (53.1%), Renewal Expected Pricing (₹5,59,000) - PASS
Frontend: HR Claims Dashboard shows 3 charts (Status Pie, Amount Breakdown Bar, Monthly Trend Line) - PASS
Frontend: HR Claims Dashboard shows claims table - PASS
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13_features.py - Created test suite for Iteration 13 features
seed_data_creation: Test policies and claims created during backend testing were cleaned up. Existing data: 3 policies (TEST_POL_112123, POL-E2E-TEST, POL-NEW-001), 3 claims in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 features fully tested and working. Key changes: 1) PolicyType enum changed from Group Health/GPA/GTL to ESKP/ESK/E. 2) Policy model now has: policy_date, policy_type (ESKP/ESK/E), premium, employees_count, spouse_count, kids_count, parents_count, total_lives_count (auto-computed as sum of all counts), addition_lives, deletion_lives. 3) Admin Policies page (/admin/policies) shows table with all new columns and Add Policy dialog with all fields including auto-calculated Total Lives display. 4) Admin Claims page (/admin/claims) has Policy Type dropdown with ESKP/ESK/E options. 5) HR Policies Dashboard (/hr/policies) shows: 6 key stats cards (Policies, Active, Premium, Total Lives, Additions, Deletions), 4 life category cards (Employees, Spouse, Kids, Parents), 3 charts (Status Pie, Lives Breakdown Pie, Type Bar), and policies table with all columns. 6) HR Claims Dashboard (/hr/claims) shows: 4 claim type cards (Total, Reimbursement, Cashless, Rejected) with count and amounts, 4 calculated metrics (Under Process, Total Premium, Claims Ratio=Claims/Premium*100, Renewal Expected Pricing=Claims*1.30), 3 charts (Status Pie, Amount Breakdown Bar, Monthly Trend Line), and claims table. 7) Backend APIs: POST/PUT /api/policies auto-computes total_lives_count, GET /api/policies-analytics returns all life category totals and type_breakdown, GET /api/claims-analytics returns all claim type breakdowns plus claims_ratio and renewal_expected_pricing.

admin_policies_page.details: Table shows all 14 columns (Policy #, Holder, Date, Type, Premium, Emp, Spouse, Kids, Parents, Total Lives, Add, Del, Status, Actions). Add Policy dialog has all fields with Policy Type dropdown (ESKP/ESK/E) and auto-calculated Total Lives display.

admin_claims_page.details: Add Claim dialog has Policy Type dropdown with ESKP/ESK/E options. Table shows Type column with policy type badges.

hr_policies_dashboard.details: Shows 6 key stats cards, 4 life category cards, 3 charts (Status Pie, Lives Breakdown Pie, Type Bar), and policies table with all columns.

hr_claims_dashboard.details: Shows 8 metric cards including Claims Ratio (53.1%) and Renewal Expected Pricing (₹5,59,000), 3 charts, and claims table.

backend_policies_api.details: POST/PUT auto-computes total_lives_count. GET /api/policies-analytics returns total_employees, total_spouse, total_kids, total_parents, total_lives, total_premium, total_addition_lives, total_deletion_lives, type_breakdown.

backend_claims_api.details: GET /api/claims-analytics returns reimbursement_claims/count, cashless_claims/count, rejected_claims/count, under_process_claims/count, total_premium, claims_ratio, renewal_expected_pricing.
